skills.name: Skill Builder
skills.notes: Creates new skills from described pain points. Manual-only.

skills.name: Skill Auditor
skills.notes: Audits manifest + usage logs. Run weekly or after 10+ log entries.

tier_definitions.core: High-frequency, high-value. Auto-invoke on. Listed first.
tier_definitions.inactive: Not used in 14+ days. Flagged for review.

tier_rules.promote_to_core: Manual, after /skill-auditor review shows high consistent value.
tier_rules.demote_to_inactive: 14+ days unused, or 3+ [DEGRADED] flags in session history.
tier_rules.retire: Inactive 30+ days with no open gap depending on it.
